title: No data/html in results for facets when the pages loads.
body:
**Fiddle below**
https://jsfiddle.net/7z13xr2a/4/

**Bug: What is the current behavior?**
Current behaviour is that the site loads the correct number of hits but there is nothing in each result see below:

![screen shot 2017-11-24 at 16 48 49](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/671281/33219019-0611c27e-d138-11e7-80b9-db9bb091ccb1.png)

![screen shot 2017-11-24 at 16 48 58](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/671281/33219024-126f97b2-d138-11e7-9910-fef3044fdfcd.png)

![screen shot 2017-11-24 at 16 49 11](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/671281/33219038-1b74349e-d138-11e7-851d-3781fa89bd1d.png)


**Bug: What is the expected behavior?**

What should be happening is that it loads all html into each result which it isn't doing!

**Bug: What browsers are impacted? Which versions?**

I am using Chrome latest and its happening on me not tested other browsers.

**Bug: What is the proposed solution?**

I think it should show the html in each result and not be blank.

**What is the version you are using? Always use the latest one before opening a bug issue.**

This is the version: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/instantsearch.js@2.2.5/dist/instantsearch.min.js

Here are some screenshots of the data being captured and the response and header data for you to look at:

![screen shot 2017-11-24 at 16 49 43](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/671281/33219102-7b225da8-d138-11e7-8cd5-23d44d214d7b.png)
![screen shot 2017-11-24 at 16 50 49](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/671281/33219103-7b36a9fc-d138-11e7-8e92-4dec1b0a386c.png)
![screen shot 2017-11-24 at 16 51 03](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/671281/33219104-7b4a0164-d138-11e7-8022-4ccff8ba094c.png)
![screen shot 2017-11-24 at 16 51 31](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/671281/33219105-7b600630-d138-11e7-81bf-27b1eb785452.png)

Thanks,
Mark
